001|# Python Trading Bot PRD for Deribit Account
002|## Project Information
003|## Language & Project Info
004|### Original Requirements
005|- Implement a Python trading bot for a Deribit account.
006|- Minimize directional risk by adjusting net delta toward a specified target.
007|- Support options and futures trading.
008|- Integrate with Telegram for notifications.
009|- Ensure accuracy in delta adjustments.
010|## Product Definition
011|### Product Goals
012|- Minimize directional risk through precise delta adjustments.
013|- Provide seamless integration with Deribit for options and futures trading.
014|- Enable real-time notifications via Telegram for trading activities.
015|### User Stories
016|- As a trader, I want the bot to adjust my net delta automatically so that I can minimize my directional risk.
017|- As a user, I want to receive Telegram notifications for significant trading events so that I can stay informed.
018|- As a developer, I want to ensure the bot supports both options and futures trading so that I can diversify my trading strategies.
019|### Competitive Analysis
020|- **Product A**: Pros: Easy to use, good customer support. Cons: Limited features.
021|- **Product B**: Pros: Advanced analytics, customizable. Cons: Steep learning curve.
022|- **Product C**: Pros: Supports multiple exchanges, robust API. Cons: High fees.
023|- **Product D**: Pros: User-friendly interface, good community. Cons: Lacks advanced trading strategies.
024|- **Product E**: Pros: Comprehensive features, strong security. Cons: Complicated setup process.

027|quadrantChart
028|    title "Competitive Analysis"

003|## Language & Project Info

006|- Minimize directional risk by adjusting net delta toward a specified target.
007|- Support options and futures trading.
008|- Integrate with Telegram for notifications.

014|- Enable real-time notifications via Telegram for trading activities.
015|### User Stories
016|- As a trader, I want the bot to adjust my net delta automatically so that I can minimize my directional risk.
017|- As a user, I want to receive Telegram notifications for significant trading events so that I can stay informed.
018|- As a developer, I want to ensure the bot supports both options and futures trading so that I can diversify my trading strategies.
019|### Competitive Analysis

021|- **Product B**: Pros: Advanced analytics, customizable. Cons: Steep learning curve.
022|- **Product C**: Pros: Supports multiple exchanges, robust API. Cons: High fees.
023|- **Product D**: Pros: User-friendly interface, good community. Cons: Lacks advanced trading strategies.

001|# Python Trading Bot PRD for Deribit Account
002|## Project Information
003|## Language & Project Info
004|### Original Requirements
005|- Implement a Python trading bot for a Deribit account.
006|- Minimize directional risk by adjusting net delta toward a specified target.
007|- Support options and futures trading.
008|- Integrate with Telegram for notifications.
009|- Ensure accuracy in delta adjustments.
010|## Product Definition
011|### Product Goals
012|- Minimize directional risk through precise delta adjustments.
013|- Provide seamless integration with Deribit for options and futures trading.
014|- Enable real-time notifications via Telegram for trading activities.
015|### User Stories
016|- As a trader, I want the bot to adjust my net delta automatically so that I can minimize my directional risk.
017|- As a user, I want to receive Telegram notifications for significant trading events so that I can stay informed.
018|- As a developer, I want to ensure the bot supports both options and futures trading so that I can diversify my trading strategies.
019|### Competitive Analysis
020|- **Product A**: Pros: Easy to use, good customer support. Cons: Limited features.
021|- **Product B**: Pros: Advanced analytics, customizable. Cons: Steep learning curve.
022|- **Product C**: Pros: Supports multiple exchanges, robust API. Cons: High fees.
023|- **Product D**: Pros: User-friendly interface, good community. Cons: Lacks advanced trading strategies.
024|- **Product E**: Pros: Comprehensive features, strong security. Cons: Complicated setup process.
025|## Competitive Quadrant Chart
026|```mermaid
027|quadrantChart
028|    title "Competitive Analysis"
029|    x-axis "Pros" --> "Cons"
030|    y-axis "Product Features"
031|    quadrant-1 "Product A"
032|    quadrant-2 "Product B"
033|    quadrant-3 "Product C"
034|    quadrant-4 "Product D"
035|    quadrant-5 "Product E"
036|    "Product A": [0.8, 0.2]
037|    "Product B": [0.6, 0.4]
038|    "Product C": [0.7, 0.3]
039|    "Product D": [0.5, 0.5]
040|    "Product E": [0.9, 0.1]
041|```
042|## Technical Specifications
043|### Requirements Analysis
044|- The bot must accurately adjust net delta based on market conditions.
045|- It should support both options and futures trading on Deribit.
046|- Integration with Telegram for real-time notifications is essential.
047|### Requirements Pool
048|- **P0**: Must-have features
049|  - Accurate delta adjustments

001|# Python Trading Bot PRD for Deribit Account
002|## Project Information
003|## Language & Project Info
004|### Original Requirements
005|- Implement a Python trading bot for a Deribit account.
006|- Minimize directional risk by adjusting net delta toward a specified target.
007|- Support options and futures trading.
008|- Integrate with Telegram for notifications.
009|- Ensure accuracy in delta adjustments.
010|## Product Definition
011|### Product Goals
012|- Minimize directional risk through precise delta adjustments.
013|- Provide seamless integration with Deribit for options and futures trading.
014|- Enable real-time notifications via Telegram for trading activities.
015|### User Stories
016|- As a trader, I want the bot to adjust my net delta automatically so that I can minimize my directional risk.
017|- As a user, I want to receive Telegram notifications for significant trading events so that I can stay informed.
018|- As a developer, I want to ensure the bot supports both options and futures trading so that I can diversify my trading strategies.
019|### Competitive Analysis
020|- **Product A**: Pros: Easy to use, good customer support. Cons: Limited features.
021|- **Product B**: Pros: Advanced analytics, customizable. Cons: Steep learning curve.
022|- **Product C**: Pros: Supports multiple exchanges, robust API. Cons: High fees.
023|- **Product D**: Pros: User-friendly interface, good community. Cons: Lacks advanced trading strategies.
024|- **Product E**: Pros: Comprehensive features, strong security. Cons: Complicated setup process.
025|## Competitive Quadrant Chart
026|```mermaid
027|quadrantChart
028|    title "Competitive Analysis"
029|    x-axis "Pros" --> "Cons"
030|    y-axis "Product Features"
031|    quadrant-1 "Product A"
032|    quadrant-2 "Product B"
033|    quadrant-3 "Product C"
034|    quadrant-4 "Product D"
035|    quadrant-5 "Product E"
036|    "Product A": [0.8, 0.2]
037|    "Product B": [0.6, 0.4]
038|    "Product C": [0.7, 0.3]
039|    "Product D": [0.5, 0.5]
040|    "Product E": [0.9, 0.1]
041|```
042|## Technical Specifications
043|### Requirements Analysis
044|- The bot must accurately adjust net delta based on market conditions.
045|- It should support both options and futures trading on Deribit.
046|- Integration with Telegram for real-time notifications is essential.
047|### Requirements Pool
048|- **P0**: Must-have features
049|  - Accurate delta adjustments
050|  - Support for options and futures trading
051|  - Telegram integration for notifications
052|- **P1**: Should-have features
053|  - User-friendly interface
054|  - Detailed logging of trading activities
055|- **P2**: Nice-to-have features
056|  - Advanced analytics and reporting
057|  - Customizable trading strategies
058|### UI Design Draft
059|- The main interface will display the current net delta and allow users to set their target delta.
060|- A section for recent trades and their outcomes will be included.
061|- Notifications from Telegram will be shown in a dedicated area of the interface.
062|- Settings for customizing trading strategies will be accessible from the main menu.

001|# Python Trading Bot PRD for Deribit Account
002|## Project Information
003|## Language & Project Info
004|### Original Requirements
005|- Implement a Python trading bot for a Deribit account.
006|- Minimize directional risk by adjusting net delta toward a specified target.
007|- Support options and futures trading.
008|- Integrate with Telegram for notifications.
009|- Ensure accuracy in delta adjustments.
010|## Product Definition
011|### Product Goals
012|- Minimize directional risk through precise delta adjustments.
013|- Provide seamless integration with Deribit for options and futures trading.
014|- Enable real-time notifications via Telegram for trading activities.
015|### User Stories
016|- As a trader, I want the bot to adjust my net delta automatically so that I can minimize my directional risk.
017|- As a user, I want to receive Telegram notifications for significant trading events so that I can stay informed.
018|- As a developer, I want to ensure the bot supports both options and futures trading so that I can diversify my trading strategies.
019|### Competitive Analysis
020|- **Product A**: Pros: Easy to use, good customer support. Cons: Limited features.
021|- **Product B**: Pros: Advanced analytics, customizable. Cons: Steep learning curve.
022|- **Product C**: Pros: Supports multiple exchanges, robust API. Cons: High fees.
023|- **Product D**: Pros: User-friendly interface, good community. Cons: Lacks advanced trading strategies.
024|- **Product E**: Pros: Comprehensive features, strong security. Cons: Complicated setup process.
025|## Competitive Quadrant Chart
026|```mermaid
027|quadrantChart
028|    title "Competitive Analysis"
029|    x-axis "Pros" --> "Cons"
030|    y-axis "Product Features"
031|    quadrant-1 "Product A"
032|    quadrant-2 "Product B"
033|    quadrant-3 "Product C"
034|    quadrant-4 "Product D"
035|    quadrant-5 "Product E"
036|    "Product A": [0.8, 0.2]
037|    "Product B": [0.6, 0.4]
038|    "Product C": [0.7, 0.3]
039|    "Product D": [0.5, 0.5]
040|    "Product E": [0.9, 0.1]
041|```
042|## Technical Specifications
043|### Requirements Analysis
044|- The bot must accurately adjust net delta based on market conditions.
045|- It should support both options and futures trading on Deribit.
046|- Integration with Telegram for real-time notifications is essential.
047|### Requirements Pool
048|- **P0**: Must-have features
049|  - Accurate delta adjustments
050|  - Support for options and futures trading
051|  - Telegram integration for notifications
052|- **P1**: Should-have features
053|  - User-friendly interface
054|  - Detailed logging of trading activities
055|- **P2**: Nice-to-have features
056|  - Advanced analytics and reporting
057|  - Customizable trading strategies
058|### UI Design Draft
059|- The main interface will display the current net delta and allow users to set their target delta.
060|- A section for recent trades and their outcomes will be included.
061|- Notifications from Telegram will be shown in a dedicated area of the interface.
062|- Settings for customizing trading strategies will be accessible from the main menu.
063|### Open Questions
064|- What specific metrics will be used to measure the accuracy of delta adjustments?
065|- Are there any regulatory considerations for trading on Deribit that we need to be aware of?
066|- What are the expected user volumes, and how will this impact the bot's performance?

Example:\n```mermaid\nquadrantChart\n    title "Reach and engagement of campaigns"\n    x-axis "Low Reach" --> "High Reach"\n    y-axis "Low Engagement" --> "High Engagement"\n    quadrant-1 "We should expand"\n    quadrant-2 "Need to promote"\n    quadrant-3 "Re-evaluate"\n    quadrant-4 "May be improved"\n    "Campaign A": [0.3, 0.6]\n    "Campaign B": [0.45, 0.23]\n    "Campaign C": [0.57, 0.69]\n    "Campaign D": [0.78, 0.34]\n    "Campaign E": [0.40, 0.34]\n    "Campaign F": [0.35, 0.78]\n    "Our Target Product": [0.5, 0.6]\n```\n\n### PRD Document Guidelines\n- Use clear requirement language (Must/Should/May)\n- Include measurable criteria\n- Prioritize clearly (P0: Must-have, P1: Should-have, P2: Nice-to-have)\n- Support with diagrams and charts\n- Focus on user value and business goals\n\n## Mode 2: Market Research\nTriggered by market analysis or competitor research requests, ending with the output of a complete report document.\n\n### **IMPORTANT** Information Collection Requirements\n\nMust follow this strict information gathering process:\n1.
